description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, white exterior. The structure features expansive windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent front entryway is accentuated by a covered porch, a set of steps, and a row of decorative shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by a low wall for privacy. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible balconies, and outdoor living spaces, suggesting a luxurious and open-plan design. The materials appear to be primarily concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden accents visible in the outdoor and balcony areas.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and a backyard swimming pool. The white exterior and open layout emphasize luxury and contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, decorative shrubs, and symmetrical window rows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and the start of the backyard with the pool visible in the distance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large swimming pool, backyard area, and extensive windows on both stories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool enclosure, additional entry points, and more of the house's flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, decorative shrubs, and a modern door flanked by large windows.
